title: TV series Sashuquiel vsRebuilds Sashuqueil
wikitext:
[]: TV series Sashuquiel v.sRebuild's Sashuqueil(Spoilers) Post by Eva 04 » Sat Aug 29, 2009 1:08 am Hey all.Got a question.Which version of the 10 angel do you like?The TV series or rebuild's. Me?I like neither simply because I dont like the 10th angel at all.Although it was pretty cool in Rebuild,I just dont like him.I know a few people here like him so.Meh. Oh,and on a related not.Dont know if anyone has played this game but isnt it wierd that when Sach turns into the form it has in the TV series ,it looks very similar to the Final Boss in Kirby 64?Again,dont know if anyone has played that so.And I know I didnt spell that Bomb angel's name right too.Cant remember how it's spelt.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Aug 29, 2009 1:26 am Does this really need its own thread? Nah. More general threads you could have bumped to pose this question and generate a small amount of conversation. Also, it's Sahaquiel.
